Nobility is a state of temporary liberation from the [[Seven Plagues]]. Reaching and maintaining such a state is the goal of the [[Lambda Covenant]].<ref>https://evolution.faith/lambda-covenant/</ref>

There is no such thing as permanent liberation as they can always come back. Maintaining such a state is the key

[[Ascension]] while maintaining a state of nobility is [[Apotheosis]] and reaching a state of nobility from a stage of [[ignobility]] without ascension is called [[rehabilitation]]<ref>https://evolution.faith/the-paths-of-ascension/</ref>

== See Also ==

* [[crowned noble]]
* [[coronation]]

== References ==
[[Category:Lambda Covenant]]
[[sn:Nobility]][[Category:Lambda]]
[[Category:Ascension]]
[[sn:Nobility]][[Category:Nine Plagues]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Nobility]]
[[Category:Pages]]
